2606.12817.title: Teach-and-Repeat: Accurately Extracting Operational Knowledge from Mobile Screen Demonstrations to Empower GUI Agents
2606.12817.paper_summary: Understanding the digital world on mobile devices is shifting from static UI perception to dynamic action comprehension. This capability enables models to convert visual state transitions into operational knowledge, defined as short natural-language sentences that describe action types, target UI elements, textual arguments, and execution orders. However, due to the highly diverse and heterogeneous UI designs across applications, existing vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to accurately infer these underlying operations. To bridge this gap, we introduce Teach VLM, a core model designed to translate mobile screen trajectories into step-wise operational knowledge by extracting and analyzing operation-related keyframes from demonstration videos. To address the scarcity of aligned training data, we develop a systematic data flywheel for scalable data acquisition. We further introduce a novel Chinese Mobile Screen Teach Benchmark for fine-grained evaluation. Building upon Teach VLM, we propose the Teach-and-Repeat paradigm, where the generated operational knowledge serves as an interpretable procedural reference to guide downstream screen-based execution agents. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that Teach VLM significantly outperforms strong VLM baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance in operation semantics prediction. Furthermore, experiments in Android World show that our paradigm yields consistent Task Success Rate improvements for downstream agents. Together, Teach VLM and the Teach-and-Repeat paradigm offer a practical pathway from raw demonstrations to reusable task automation.
2606.12817.paper_summary_zh: 理解移動設備上的數位世界正在從靜態的使用者介面感知轉向動態的行動理解。這種能力使模型能夠將視覺狀態轉換為操作知識，該知識被定義為描述行動類型、目標使用者介面元素、文本參數和執行順序的簡短自然語言句子。然後，由於應用程式之間的使用者介面設計高度多樣且異質，現有的視覺語言模型（VLMs）在準確推斷這些潛在操作方面面臨挑戰。為了彌補這一差距，我們引入了Teach VLM，一個核心模型，旨在通過從示範視頻中提取和分析與操作相關的關鍵幀，將移動螢幕軌跡轉換為逐步操作知識。為了解決對齊訓練數據的稀缺問題，我們開發了一個系統化的數據飛輪以進行可擴展的數據獲取。我們進一步引入了一個新穎的中文移動螢幕教學基準，以進行細粒度評估。在Teach VLM的基礎上，我們提出了Teach-and-Repeat範式，其中生成的操作知識作為可解釋的程序參考，以指導下游基於螢幕的執行代理。廣泛的評估表明，Teach VLM顯著超越了強大的VLM基準，在操作語義預測中達到了最先進的性能。此外，在Android World的實驗顯示，我們的範式為下游代理帶來了一致的任務成功率提升。總之，Teach VLM和Teach-and-Repeat範式提供了一條從原始示範到可重用任務自動化的實用途徑。
2606.12817.author: Yudong Zhang et.al.
2606.12817.authors: Yudong Zhang, Lei Hu, Daoyang Liu, Jiawei Liu, Yangfan Luo, Xingyu Liu, Zuojian Wang, Zhilin Gao
